prompt: I synced my lightning node yesterday and ran a balance sheet but it's showing nothing. Also once that's fixed, I want to tag a few transactions as business expenses for tax purposes.

assertions.text: Identifies that journals need to be processed as the most likely fix (not re-syncing or other guesses)
Does not re-sync connections when the user already said they synced yesterday
Checks for quarantined events as a secondary diagnostic
Creates a business expense tag and applies it to events
Re-processes journals after applying tags so reports reflect the changes
The workflow ends with the user seeing a working balance sheet
